chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 654 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 24-03-2025 Applicant is present in person. Mr. Muhammad Rafique Kalwar, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. **** Heard applicant in person. From perusal of impugned order, no illegality and/or irregularity is found calling for interference of this Court. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
